details.IncidentDetail: "[2] MOVED AN 1144 PIG OUT OF THE RDWY "

"[13] 1021 FROM HAGEDORN - ADVISED COW BELONGS TO FISHERS AND HAS YELLOW TAG ON EAR. RP STATED SHE GOT COW INTO LOWER FIELD WHERE IT TOOK OFF IN UNK DIRECTION."

"[31] [Notification] [CHP]-PER FIRE - THEY DO NOT HAVE THE EQUIPTMENT TO CUT UP THE TREE - WILL HAVE TO BE A CALTRANS HANDLE "
"[29] 52T LL - HAVE THE TREE IN A SAFER POSITION FOR FIRE TO ASSIST / PLS CALL THEM BACK OUT"
"[23] PER FIRE - TOO DANGEROUS TO CUT "

"[11] FIRE WILL 1023 TIL CHP ADV IF 97 AND IF FIRE IS NEEDED"
"[2] AT END OF ONR IN MERGING AND PARTIAL SLOW LN"
